name: Ferplast Kitty Ltr Tray AssrtD 2099
shortDescription: The FERPLAST KITTY Litter Tray (2099) offers a simple yet effective solution for your cat’s hygiene needs. Designed with both pet and owner in mind, this tray ensures convenience, comfort, and cleanliness in everyday use.
description: Product Features: Durable, Easy-to-Clean Material: Constructed from high-quality, long-lasting plastic that allows for quick and hassle-free cleaning—perfect for busy pet owners. Low Entry Design: Features a low front edge to provide easy access, making it ideal for kittens, senior cats, or pets with mobility issues. Promotes Hygiene & Activity: Encourages regular litter box use, supporting overall feline health and helping prevent obesity by promoting routine movement. Neat & Tidy: The open design helps keep the surrounding area clean and allows for easy monitoring and maintenance
